timer-color.description: Colour of the countdown number inside the timer ring

timer-ring-color.description: Colour of the draining timer ring arc

progress-color.description: Colour of the progress bar fill and outer value ring

glow-color.description: Glow surrounding the card. Transparent to disable.

puff-color.description: Colour of the expiry puff particles
